page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 40 dedicated physical cores running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 9.6 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

Benchmark results place this instance in the average tier for its hardware class. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance is recorded at 1436.39, while multi-core performance reaches 38318.39. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block speed of 2128.36 GB/sec and a large block speed of 111.38 GB/sec. In database-related benchmarks, the instance achieves 14328.81 in PassMark database operations and processes 32.74 million operations per second in Redis SET tests. For lightweight machine learning tasks, it handles prompt processing for a small 135M LLM model at 1934.13 tokens per second and a medium 7B model at 56.33 tokens per second.

The ecs.hfr6.10xlarge offers high resource density for memory-bound workloads, providing dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. However, the lack of local storage requires external block storage, which may introduce latency tradeoffs depending on the network configuration. Given its high memory capacity and strong database benchmark performance, this instance is well-suited for in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, enterprise database operations, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor on the x86_64 architecture, it features 40 dedicated physical cores running at 3.1 GHz and 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 9.6 GB. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, utilizing a 12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth instead. Performance benchmarks indicate solid capabilities, with a PassMark CPU score of 34031.19 and a Redis SET throughput of 32.74 million operations per second. The high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation make this instance highly efficient for in-memory databases, caching layers, and large-scale database operations, though users must factor in the reliance on network-attached storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 40 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 384 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, ideal for in-memory databases and caching.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 40 Intel Xeon cores and 384 GB RAM, designed for database workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores for demanding database and in-memory caching workloads.

384.0 GB of RAM providing 9.6 GB per core for memory-heavy tasks
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPUs
